query:
INSERT INTO system_settings (settingKey, settingValue, settingType, description, displayName) 
VALUES ('quotation_approval_threshold', '10000', 'number', '报价单金额超过此阈值时需要管理员审批', '报价审批阈值')
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE settingValue = '10000'
